sentences.arabic: غَسْلُ الْيَدَيْنِ بِالْمَاءِ وَالصَّابُونِ يَحْمِينَا مِنْ أَمْرَاضٍ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pranje ruku vodom i sapunom štiti nas od mnogih bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Washing hands with water and soap protects us from many diseases.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ غَسْلُ الْيَدَيْنِ قَبْلَ الْأَكْلِ وَبَعْدَ الْعَوْدَةِ إِلَى الْمَنْزِلِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je oprati ruke prije jela i nakon povratka kući.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to wash hands before eating and after returning home.

sentences.arabic: النَّظَافَةُ جُزْءٌ مِنْ نَمَطِ الْحَيَاةِ الصِّحِّيِّ لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Čistoća je dio zdravog načina života za sve.
sentences.translationEn: Cleanliness is part of a healthy lifestyle for everyone.
